title: RDMA / Thunderbolt cluster speedup (illustrative)
methodology: exo (distributed MLX inference) reports up to ~1.8× speedup with 2 devices and ~3.2× with 4 devices in tensor-parallel mode over Thunderbolt, with RDMA reducing inter-device latency (see sources). This page models combined inference speedup as S(N)=N^β where β is the average of log₂(1.8) and log₄(3.2) so the curve passes near both published anchors. That is a curve fit for visualization — not a guarantee for your model or topology.

anchors.note: exo: up to ~1.8× vs one device
exo: up to ~3.2× vs one device

sources.title: Virge.io — exo, tensor parallelism & RDMA over Thunderbolt
